schema_purpose: This file lists trip-critical risks that the app must surface prominently (e.g. a red banner, not just buried in reference notes). Check this file for alerts matching the user's current or upcoming waypoint, and display any 'critical' severity alert unmissably -- on the map, in the day's itinerary view, and ideally as a push/local notification a day before the affected waypoint if the app supports scheduling against dates.

alerts.title: Possible transport gap: Vakkotavare -> Kebnats, around 6 September 2026
alerts.short_summary: The only bus connecting Vakkotavare to the Kebnats boat pier may not run on 6 September 2026. Missing this bus strands you at Vakkotavare with no boat access to Saltoluokta that day.
alerts.trip_context: Based on a south-to-north start from Kvikkjokk on 1 September 2026, arrival at Vakkotavare (km 81.4) is estimated around 6-10 September 2026, depending on pace and rest days -- this estimate itself is not precise, which is part of the risk.
alerts.details: Bus operator Road to Ritsem runs two daily trips (Tur 1 and Tur 2) in season, but their date ranges do not overlap around early September: Tur 1 (Vakkotavare departure 14:40) stops running after 5 September and resumes 14 September. Tur 2 (Vakkotavare departure 09:20, the direction needed here) only starts running 7 September. This leaves 6 September with no scheduled departure under either trip as currently published. The operator's own site also warns that 2026 train-maintenance disruption in Gällivare is causing irregular bus operation this summer, so even the printed schedule may not be reliable on other nearby dates either.
alerts.why_it_matters: Vakkotavare has no shop (per route.json shop data) and is not on a through-road with easy alternative transport. Missing the only bus of the day means an unplanned extra night with no resupply, and no guaranteed way to reach Saltoluokta or continue the hike that day.
action_required: As the hike progresses, re-estimate the actual arrival date at Vakkotavare and check whether it lands on or near 6 September 2026.
Re-check bus_vakkotavare_kebnats.json close to departure (schedules and disruption notices can change).
If the estimated arrival date is 6 September or uncertain, consider building in a deliberate rest day earlier in the trip to shift arrival to 7 September or later, or to before 5 September.
Call Road to Ritsem directly (+46 970 248 00) once a firm date is known, to confirm that day's actual operation.
As a backup, the STF contacts for arranging transport outside the timetable (Christer Dynesius +46 70 241 66 35, Tobbe Öberg +46 70 340 42 72) may be able to advise on alternatives on the day.
